'''''The Baby Ewoks' Picnic Surprise''''' is a 1984 children's book written by [[Melinda Luke]] and illustrated by [[Pat Paris]]. It was published by [[Random House]].

==Plot summary==
[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] babysit [[Nippet/Legends|Nippet]] and [[Wiley (Ewok)|Wiley]] and decide to take them [[Fishing/Legends|fishing]] and have a picnic. The [[Wokling/Legends|woklings]] get into mischief and discover [[Rainbow berry|rainbow berries]] which the Ewoks use to make [[Rainbow Berry Pie|rainbow berry pies]] for their [[Harvest Moon Feast]].
